items.title: Killers of British couple in South Africa sentenced to life
items.dek: The pair had been collecting rare plants and seeds before their bodies were found days later in a river.
items.body: The pair had been collecting rare plants and seeds before their bodies were found days later in a river.

items.title: 'End American Aid': Netanyahu Says Israel No Longer Needs US Assistance

items.title: Bomb blast at Damascus cafe kills six, Syrian state media say
items.dek: There was no immediate claim for the bombing at a cafe close to the Palace of Justice, a major government building.
items.body: There was no immediate claim for the bombing at a cafe close to the Palace of Justice, a major government building.
